title: Sanji and Zoro Reach Their Limits
description: On pages 18–21, this part focuses on Unknown person #17, Unknown person #18, Yamato, Unknown person #19, Unknown person #20, King as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: So that's the first division common-der, Marco...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But who's the one next to him with the red flames?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's hurry up and crush them so we can get back to the ship!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So fast... and on top of that they can use Haki.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These guys are at a level where they can pick a fight with white- beard.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If this level of pirate causes you trouble...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...then taking pops' head is just a pipe dream.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: I'm just saying, you shouldn't growl...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...If you can't bite harder than a puppy- you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The thought of doing exactly what thatch wants pisses me off. But...

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: The perfect place to sharpen my fangs!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Yea, he challen- Ged pops again today.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: How long's he gonna keep this up?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If the Le's the ETS to be this

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: He'll be running away in no time.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: What the hell's a "white- beard", even!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's got the guts to see this through to the end.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...been leaning too hard on the part of Haki you're best at, haven't you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You gotta expand the reach of your abilities.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's funny how careless you Logia users are!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 46 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
